_note: bot.py reads all tunable params from this file. Operator-only; no autonomous writer touches it (bot_hourly retired 2026-04-25). Apr 25 2026: NEAR_CERTAIN pivoted from 0.99+ Penny Trap to aggressive 0.80-0.88 entries with dynamic exit ladder; AGGRESSIVE engine retired.

trading_host._note: Single field. engine_registry.is_active_trading_host() compares socket.gethostname() to active_hostname. Only that machine places live orders. To migrate: hostnamectl set-hostname <new> on new VPS, then update this value.

price_bands._note: Aligned 2026-05-02 with NC v3 outer band (NC_V3_PRICE_MIN_OUTER=0.72 / MAX_OUTER=0.92 in nc_v3_scan.py). Per-cell ALLOW_TABLE inside v3 narrows further. Was 0.80-0.88 v2 strategy — retired when v3 wired 2026-04-30. ws_engine.py and engine_registry.py read these keys.

capital_allocation._note: Max % of bankroll deployable per engine. NEAR_CERTAIN (now operating in 0.80-0.88 zone) gets the lion's share.

wallets._note: Multi-wallet support. wallet_id = unique key. label = display name. platform = which exchange. One person can have multiple wallets across platforms.

bet_sizing._note: Single sizing knob: nc_pct_of_bankroll. _get_bet returns pct*bankroll, no floor/cap/guard. Polymarket protocol $5 min enforced by caller-skip on undersized bet. Operator directive 2026-05-02.

strategy._note: 2026-04-25: AGGRESSIVE engine collapsed into NEAR_CERTAIN. NC now uses 0.80-0.88 entry, dynamic exit ladder 0.98/0.97/0.96 (10s/rung quick fallback), hard stop at 0.60 absolute price, 1h volatility filter, circuit breakers, 2-rung dupguard. All sub-flags below tune NC behavior.

dupguard._note: MAX 2 positions per market per engine enables 2-rung ladder. Each rung uses the FULL bet from _get_bet (NOT half — example: $12 + $12 = $24 deployed per market at $12 NC base). min_price_delta=0.04 prevents both rungs firing at the same price (must be ≥4¢ apart). Opposing-side bets always blocked. Use this as backstop if 0.80-0.88 universe is thin: same market can absorb 2× capital.

time_decay_harvest._note: Markets closing within max_hours_to_close get 2.0x priority weight in scanner. Avoids multi-day UMA lockup, matches paper-trade speed mechanism.

clob_throttle._note: Polymarket CLOB enforces one order at a time per wallet. 250ms between submissions avoids nonce collisions. Batch endpoint /orders accepts up to 15 in one HTTP call.

haiku_cache._note: SQLite disk cache for Haiku verdicts. Cuts cost dramatically by avoiding re-scan of same slug. Invalidates on large price move. DB path resolves to ./haiku_cache.db alongside bot.py on each machine.

nc_strategy._note: NEAR_CERTAIN aggressive strategy params (Apr 25 2026 pivot). Replaces the dormant 'aggressive_entry' block. All knobs read at runtime by NC scanner + execute_sell + monitor.

exit_ladder._note: Dynamic price ladder for sell-early. Try aim_high first, walk down quickly if no fill. Per-rung dwell = quick (10s), not 30s, so a position never sits >30s waiting for sell-side liquidity.

nc_strategy.hard_stop_note: Absolute price stop. Bot exits if curPrice drops below 0.60 from any entry, regardless of position-level pnl. Caps max loss per $12 bet at -$3.60 (worst case 0.84 entry -> 0.60 exit).

volatility_filter._note: Multi-AI Tier 5 audit 2026-04-25: switched from absolute cents (10c) to PERCENTAGE of entry price (12%) — 10c on 0.90 ≠ 10c on 0.50. Falls back to absolute cents if use_percentage=false. min_observations=4 prevents startup-blindspot trade-on-no-data.

circuit_breakers._note: Reset daily at UTC midnight. daily_drawdown_pct measured against bankroll snapshot at 00:00 UTC. consecutive_losses counts settled LOST trades in NC since last WIN.

arb._note: 2026-04-25 cross-platform arb settings. enabled=False until operator confirms balances/strategy in interactive session. allow_single_leg=True permits directional bets when one platform unfunded (uses cross-platform mispricing as signal; no hedge — operator accepts directional risk).

_short_term_disabled_2026_04_27: operator focus on NC only until strategy is dialed in
